paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. was last reported at 6.65, representing an 8.66 percent increase from the prior close, but a 25.86 percent decrease over the last 21 sessions.

The recent news headlines include announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, set for August 13, 2026, as well as discussions around the company's governance and a recent convertible notes deal. A director's resignation due to governance concerns has also been reported.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as filings related to the issuance of convertible senior notes due 2031. One Form 4 filing has been reported in the feed.
